response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack development experience with relevant technologies such as TypeScript, Node.js, and React. He has worked on complex projects, contributed to AI-agent infrastructure, and demonstrated proficiency in multiple programming languages and technologies required by the role.
strengths: Proficiency in required technologies like TypeScript and Node.js
Strong background in building complex, scalable applications
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Some mismatch in primary backend technology (uses various languages)
Less evident experience with cloud platforms like AWS, GCP, or Azure
